name: Jira
description: Jira is the #1 project management tool for agile teams. Plan sprints, track bugs, manage backlogs, and ship great software faster. Integrates seamlessly with GitHub, Confluence, Slack, and 3,000+ apps.

name: ChatGPT
description: ChatGPT is an AI-powered assistant that helps you write, research, brainstorm, translate, and code. Powered by GPT-4o, it adapts to your needs with real-time web search, image generation, and voice conversation features.

name: Canva: Design, Photo & Video
description: Canva is the world's most popular design platform. Create stunning social media posts, presentations, posters, logos, and videos using thousands of templates. AI-powered tools make professional design easy for everyone.

name: Duolingo: Language Lessons
description: Duolingo is the world's most popular way to learn a language. Practice Spanish, French, German, Japanese, and 40+ more languages with fun, bite-sized lessons powered by AI tutors and gamified streaks.

name: Spotify: Music & Podcasts
description: Spotify is the leading audio streaming platform with over 100 million songs and 5 million podcasts. Discover new music with personalized playlists like Discover Weekly and Daily Mix. Enjoy offline listening with Premium.

name: TikTok
description: TikTok is the world's leading short-form video platform. Create, share, and discover entertaining videos with powerful editing tools, filters, and an AI-powered For You feed.

name: Instagram
description: Instagram is a visual-first social media platform for sharing photos, reels, and stories. Connect with creators, discover brands, and grow your audience with powerful tools for content creation and marketing.

name: WhatsApp Messenger
description: WhatsApp is the world's most popular messaging app. Send texts, voice messages, make HD video calls, share media, and stay connected with end-to-end encryption for privacy.

name: Google Gemini
description: Google Gemini is an advanced AI assistant integrated across Android and Google Workspace. Generate content, summarize documents, analyze images, and automate tasks with multimodal AI capabilities.

name: YouTube
description: YouTube is the world's largest video platform. Watch, upload, and share videos across every topic. Enjoy YouTube Premium for ad-free viewing, background play, and exclusive original content.

name: Facebook
description: Facebook connects billions of people worldwide. Share updates, join groups, watch reels, follow pages, and discover events in your community. AI-powered feed keeps you updated on what matters most.

name: Telegram
description: Telegram is a cloud-based messaging app with a strong focus on speed and privacy. Supports large group chats, channels, bots, file sharing up to 4GB, and end-to-end encrypted secret chats.

name: Netflix
description: Netflix is the world's leading streaming service with thousands of movies, TV shows, documentaries, and Netflix Originals. Stream in 4K on any device with offline download support.

name: Threads
description: Threads is Meta's text-based social media platform for real-time conversations. Share short posts, follow trending topics, and engage with a global community closely integrated with Instagram.

name: Amazon Shopping
description: Amazon Shopping lets you browse millions of products, track orders, and enjoy fast delivery with Prime. AR View lets you visualize products in your space before buying.

name: Temu
description: Temu is a fast-growing global shopping app offering a massive range of products at competitive prices. Daily deals, flash sales, and free shipping make it one of the most downloaded shopping apps worldwide.

name: Notion
description: Notion is an all-in-one workspace for notes, wikis, databases, and project management. AI-powered writing tools, drag-and-drop pages, and real-time collaboration make it a productivity powerhouse.

name: Microsoft Copilot
description: Microsoft Copilot is an AI assistant embedded across Microsoft 365 tools. Automate documentation, generate content, analyze data in Excel, and draft emails with intelligent context-aware suggestions.

name: Slack
description: Slack is a team communication platform with AI-powered message summaries, Focus Mode, and Voice Huddles. Organize conversations in channels, automate workflows, and integrate with 2,600+ apps.

name: Uber Eats
description: Uber Eats delivers food from your favorite restaurants straight to your door. AI-powered predictive ordering, real-time tracking, and exclusive deals make every meal effortless.

name: Revolut
description: Revolut is a digital banking app for multi-currency accounts, international transfers, stock trading, and crypto. Smart budgeting tools and instant spending notifications help manage your finances.

name: Robinhood
description: Robinhood offers commission-free stock, ETF, options, and crypto trading. Real-time market data, fractional shares, and an intuitive UI make investing accessible for beginners and experts alike.

name: Strava
description: Strava is the ultimate activity tracking app for runners, cyclists, and outdoor athletes. Log workouts, analyze performance stats, join challenges, and connect with a global community of 120M+ athletes.

name: Headspace
description: Headspace is a leading meditation and mindfulness app with guided sessions for stress, anxiety, sleep, and focus. AI-powered daily recommendations personalize your mental wellness journey.

name: AllTrails
description: AllTrails is the go-to hiking and trail navigation app with 400,000+ trails worldwide. Offline maps, custom routes, community reviews, and Outdoor Lens AR help you explore nature safely.
